programme.desc: Brent tries to stop Oscar from using his favorite word. A psychic predicts Lacey's future.

programme.title: Corner Gas

programme.desc: Karen and Davis bribe Oscar for Christmas gift info. Lacey doubts Wanda's friendship.

programme.title: Corner Gas

programme.title: Corner Gas

programme.desc: There are more than 50 YMCAs across Canada. National CEO Scott Haldane has worked for the organization for his entire career, since joining as a lifeguard when he was 16. Now he's going undercover and back to the basics.

programme.title: Undercover Boss (Canada)
programme.desc: Former mud wrestler and fight promoter, Rick Smiciklas now heads a huge beer and wings franchise. His daughter worries that he's too feisty to complete his undercover work week. Will the Wild Wing man keep his composure?

programme.title: Undercover Boss (Canada)
programme.desc: President of Orkin Canada pest controllers, Gary Muldoon, is going undercover out on the road. Working in disguise under an assumed identity, he soon discovers that staff lack some of the tools to make their working life easier.

programme.title: Undercover Boss (Canada)
programme.desc: Clark Builders is responsible for creating commercial and industrial buildings, with a workforce of nearly 1000. Andy Clark, the Chairman and Founder, puts on a tool belt for the first time in 30 years and joins his building site crews undercover.

programme.title: Undercover Boss (Canada)
programme.desc: Life on the road takes its toll when the bosses of North Americas biggest independent cabbies, Beck Taxi, go undercover.

programme.title: Undercover Boss (Canada)
programme.desc: The CEO of Bellstar Hotel and Resorts, Ed Romanowski, goes undercover and joins housekeeping staff. He struggles to keep up and makes some startling discoveries about the business he's running.

programme.title: Undercover Boss (Canada)
programme.desc: Brandi Halls has a top job at cosmetics giant Lush. But she's cut down to size when she joins the frontline to work undercover and find ways to improve the company.

programme.title: Undercover Boss (Canada)
programme.desc: When Stuart Suls, CEO of Mr Lube, goes undercover he discovers he can't even install windscreen wipers, let alone deal with what's under the hood.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: A beautiful kelpie is brought to Chris in a terrible state. A knock to the head as a puppy has caused severe balance problems but his condition is now deteriorating rapidly. His loving owner Heidi already has a baby to look after but she is constantly assisting Jasper and cannot bear the thought of losing him. In desperation, she looks to Chris for an answer. A brain scan shows his problems are inoperable but Chris refuses to give in. A custom made cart is fitted for Jasper and the sight of him moving about with his new “ wheels” is a heart warming salute to love and persistence.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Jen brings in her son’s dog Jewel to Dr Chris to find out if she’s expecting. The complication? This is an unplanned pregnancy and Jen suspects the father is her own dog, Token. X rays prove Jewel is having a football team of puppies. Get ready for a long night of anxiety, sadness and ultimately joy as Dr Chris helps Jewel through her ordeal. Funny scenes as proud father, Token keeps a close eye on proceedings to make sure his offspring are being well looked after.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: A beautiful pig is about to become pork chops if she keeps digging up the family property with her broken nose ring. Her owner, Allison loves Lola and has asked Chris to find a way to stop the execution. A new nose ring is the answer. Sounds easy but sedating an angry pig turns out to be a tough challenge. Watch out for some hilarious chase scenes.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Honey has taken a death-defying leap out of a car doing 40 kms an hour to chase down a cat. Somehow the spoodle has survived but just how serious are her injuries? Owner, Ilana is suffering enormous guilt that she didn’t have the family’s pride and joy safety strapped in the car. Watch for the cat hating spoodle’s reaction when she hears her archenemies out the back of the Bondi clinic.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Chris finally has a weekend off vet duties and is heading to Newcastle to catch up with his parents. But a call from his dad about a bizarre snake emergency sends him on a fascinating detour. What has the huge python swallowed that is now threatening to kill him? This a case of truth being stranger then fiction.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: A game of chasey at home turns ugly for Hooligan when he runs into his owner, Sarah. Hooligan’s horribly fractured leg needs major surgery at Sash but the tiny terrier has never spent a night away from his family and is not coping.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Chris is about to be confronted with the smallest patient he has ever handled. Twelve-year old Elliot’s much-loved pet mouse, Pinot has developed a massive, cancerous tumour. But surgery on such a pint-sized patient is going to be a real challenge. Will Pinot pull through or will a young girl be shattered?

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Homer the turtle is going on holidays while his owner is overseas. What can go wrong? Well ...try finding the little fellow in the fangs of the resident pooch. Babysitter Jody is guilt ridden and the traumatised Homer is the victim of a big bacteria bite. Can Chris save the day for everyone?

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Chris heads to the Victorian high country to help out a mate and to realise a boyhood dream of becoming a vet in the bush. It’s a challenging week as he treats everything from horses to wombats and monkeys and helps save a mother in trouble. Monkeys carry some nasty diseases and watch for Chris’ concerns about what he might leave Mansfield with. Talk about a dangerous job.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Pearl was at her regular hairdressing appointment when she started bleeding internally. Now the pampered poodle may have minutes to live and Chris is her only hope.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Little Lucu has been attacked by a paralysis tick and the poison is rapidly shutting down her system. A round the clock watch is needed to keep this innocent victim alive. But will it be enough?

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: A bizarre looking baby cockatoo has fallen twenty metres out of her nest and wants to alert the whole world to her plight. Can Chris help the little screamer and will she ever be able to fly?

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: An emotional case for Chris as he fights to save one of the clinic’s favourite patients. Beautiful Bluebell was dumped on the doorstep of the clinic as a kitten and adopted out to a loving family. Now Bluebell is the victim of a hit run accident and all the staff at Bondi are directly affected.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: The Australian Reptile Park operations manager, Tim Faulkner ropes Chris into a frightening mission in far north Queensland. A monster seven metre python called Big Mamma is living in the roof of a local boating club and the female paddlers are terrified. It’s all up to the intrepid duo as they head to Cairns to try to capture the scary reptile.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: A quick thinking police officer in Sydney’s infamous King Cross has rescued a twelve-week old puppy and rushed her into the Bondi clinic. The puppy was found sweltering in forty degree heat in a plastic handbag and the culprit has been arrested. Little Tilly soon finds a place in Chris’ heart and home where she has a confrontation with the resident cat, George. Without a microchip, the search is on for her owner.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: A morning walk has gone tragically wrong for Tigger and his distressed owner Bernadette. A street cleaner spooked the five year old and sent him charging into a car. Chris is trying to calm them both down to find out the extent of Tigger’s injuries.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Ziggy is a dog with an embarrassing problem. A huge mass is hanging off his back leg. Bemused vet nurse Neil tells us its like “ a third testicle swinging in the wind.” But when it comes to surgery it’s no laughing matter for Chris.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Boris the Staffy was born with a cleft palate. Lucky to survive, he has now endured seven operations to try to fix the gaping hole in his mouth. All have failed and time is running out. Chronic infections are now destroying his quality of life. Like Boris, his owner Jess is refusing to give up. She’s written to Chris looking for one last chance. The surgery will be the first of its type ever performed in Australia. Eight thousand dollars needs to be raised and Chris is prepared to go all the way for Boris!

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: West Highland terrier, Chester lives in Bondi but has a fanatical hatred of skateboarders. It’s a dangerous combination and one that is making life hell for his owners Mark and Jess. They’re worried Chester could bite someone and end up in serious trouble. What can Dr Chris come up with to tame the savage terrier?

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: 6 month old German Shepherd, Gypsy hasn't been able to keep any food down for weeks and is losing weight rapidly. But getting to the bottom of the problem is proving impossible as the petrified patient refuses to let anybody examine her. Lisa is seriously concerned about what has happened to this young pup. Will it be a happy ending for Gypsy?

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: A critically ill swan has been found caught up in a soccer net in a suburban backyard. The bird is emaciated and running out of time. Has Chris arrived in time to save the swan from certain death?

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: A story that is sure to touch your heart. Poppy is a Fijian native dog whose nose was cut off in a horrific hunting accident. In the north of Fiji there are no full time vets. Volunteers at Animals Fiji have managed to keep her alive with donations raised in Australia. Now Chris has gone to Fiji to bring the little girl back to Australia for major reconstructive surgery and hopefully a whole new life with an adopted family. Unless something is done, Poppy will always face serious infections and be shunned because of her shocking brutal injuries.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: One year-old Hero has been vomiting all day and his owners are worried he’s been up to his old tricks eating rocks from their backyard. Can Lisa help the naughty Labrador pass the rock or will he be forced to have major surgery?

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Mitsy may appear to be normal but there is something terribly wrong. The rescue kitten is struggling to walk since being micro chipped and her foster family is worried that a misplaced chip may have caused spinal damage. Andrew Marchevsky is left with no other option but to operate. Will the surgery restore Mitzi's ability to walk or will she be made permanently worse?

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Chris is answering a call for help from May Dodd, who runs an animal shelter for abandoned donkeys. One of her residents, Dusty, has developed a very strange walk. May is worried if nothing can be done to help Dusty walk normally again, the donkey’s diminished quality of life that will be unbearable. Can Chris get to the bottom of this mysterious problem and save Dusty?

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: There’s no time to rest as Chris is sent straight out to help a pregnant cow through a difficult labor. And his midwife duties are not over yet.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Chris’ country locum at the Kyabram Veterinary Clinic continues and some of his patients are a little out of the ordinary. Harriet the Bearded Dragon is a much loved resident of the local Fauna Park. Her Keeper Hannah is concerned about a lump that has suddenly appeared on the dragon's leg. The worry is that it could be cancer. Chris decides removing the lump is the only option, but on the operating table, things go horribly wrong. Can Chris save Harriet?

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: At the Australian reptile park, Operations Manager Tim Faulkner is responding to an in-house emergency. Cameron the Cormorant has swallowed a mystery object, and it’s caused a dangerous swelling in the little bird's throat. Tim needs to remove the object urgently or Cameron may choke to death.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Chris faces a porker of a decision as he helps a young family choose a very unusual pet – a Mini Pig. A wrong decision could cause chaos, so Chris needs to make sure that the family is ready for the challenges of owning a little piggie.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Chris's holiday in far north Queensland is interrupted as word of the visiting Vet has spread like wildfire. First stop is the Cairns Rainforest Station Nature Park where Chris has been asked to help a crook crocodile. A few months ago, Agro broke his jaw biting down on a steel fence. Chris needs to examine the injury, but everyone is on high alert for a very good reason. Not so long ago, Agro killed 9 other crocs that shared his pond. Is Chris biting off more than he can chew?

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Ten-week-old Nala has been rushed to SASH with an extremely swollen face. It is so bad that she can barely see. The little Golden Retriever needs to stay in overnight for observation, but her protective owner isn’t willing to part with her baby. Will this new Mum follow doctor’s orders or take a risk with her sick puppy?

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Little Gizmo was saved from death row by Denise from PAWS rescue. The little Shih Tzu is suffering chronic ear infections, and for the last three months since his rescue, Chris and Denise have tried unsuccessfully to treat the debilitating problem. Chris is now being forced to take extreme measures or Gizmo will never be able to find a new forever home.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: A sudden problem with Jemima’s hind leg has put an abrupt stop to her full throttle lifestyle. The shorthaired pointer has shattered her cruciate ligament, and without surgery she will never be able to walk normally again. Can Andrew Marchevsky repair Jemima’s badly damaged leg?

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Chris heads to Victoria in response to an SOS from a young volunteer at Safe Haven Horse rescue. 11 year old Tash has fallen in love with a surrendered appaloosa gelding, Charlie. Tash is worried about a huge lump growing on Charlie’s eye and she’s hoping Chris can save her much loved Charlie.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Chris is at the Hunter Valley to check on one of the zoo’s oldest residents, Mal. The 30-year-old spider monkey has a huge lump growing inside his mouth that has started to bleed. Chris needs to examine the lump to determine if it’s an easily treatable infection or a life-threatening tumor. What’s the diagnosis for this much loved monkey?

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Mini pig James’s obsessive digging has got him in serious trouble with the local authorities. If he doesn’t stop digging massive holes in the park, the council may ban him. Can Chris solve this porker of a problem?

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: On this special episode… Chris travels to Thailand to work with a wildlife crusader. Edwin Wiek and his team care for hundreds of homeless animals, many of them victims of abuse. Urgent medical attention is needed for patients ranging from elephants to monkeys to a sunbear. Chris also witnesses what happens when Thailand’s desperate elephants run out of food and a place to live. It’s a touching and sometimes confronting journey.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: A medical mystery for Chris as he tries to diagnose what’s wrong with a beautiful five month old border collie. puppy. Even Sash specialist surgeon Andrew is forced to look overseas for answers to this rare and baffling case. Plus we meet the newest member of the Bondi Vet family….Lisa’s tiny son, Hudson. Does he get on with his four legged brothers? Watch and smile.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Another remarkable journey for Chris. This time he travels to the remote parts of northern Kenya to see the work of a brave Aussie zoo keeper fighting to save some of the world’s most endangered animals. In this extraordinary episode, Chris treats an orphaned baby rhino, takes cover from gunfire as an anti poaching squad hunts down a killer and saves the life of a badly mauled goat. Plus the Bondi Vet meets some amazing women and finds out how their beautiful beads are saving wildlife and gets involved with a crazy jumping competition with some Masai warriors.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Dr Chris Brown and Dr Lisa Chimes head out to the burnt regions of the Blue Mountains on the Sydney outskirts the day after some of the most intense bushfires on record. The mass evacuations of farms and properties have left animals injured, stranded or in distress. The Bondi Vet team take to the road to help where they can. The last thing Chris expected was to be treating a baby alpaca named Jersey. Jersey’s mother went into premature labour, brought on by the stressful evacuation of the herd from their fire threatened property. Now the new-born Cria (baby alpaca) is listless and deteriorating alarming.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: In this episode of Bondi Vet, Georgie, a small rescue dog, is brought in to see Dr Chris Brown. Georgie has a massive growth on her leg and Chris discovers another lump that is possibly more sinister. she will need an immediate, marathon operation that Chris hopes the dog can survive.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Dr Chris is heading to the Halls Gap Zoo in Western Victoria where Stephanie the Lemur awaits. Recently the keepers have noticed her left canine tooth has darkened and are concerned it is an infection that could become a major problem for the small Lemur, especially as they suspect she may be pregnant.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Dr Chris has received a call from Tim Faulkner at the Australian Reptile Park. One of the parks kangaroo’s has a nasty lump under its chin and Chris needs to make an emergency dash to the park to perform an urgent operation, that is made more difficult as the roo is a mother with young joey.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: “It doesn’t get much better than this” is one of the first things that Dr Chris says when a 4 week old baby lion cub Zambi is brought into the Bondi Clinic. For safety reasons Zambi has had to be removed from her mother by carers Donna and Mandy from the animal welfare organization LOTL (Life On The Line) Rescue. Not only does the young lion require a medical checkup but she also needs a surrogate mother and Dr Chris has the perfect – while very strange solution. No one is sure if it will work.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Chris is in Cairns, a place he loves because no case is ever straightforward in the tropics and he is not disappointed. His first case is to try to solve the mystery medical condition of Snoopy, a Jack Russell terrier, who at odd times suffers strange and potentially deadly attacks.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Chris is still in Cairns working as a locum at the local Marlin Coast Vet Clinic and yet again the tropic north does not disappoint when it come the weird and wild animals. First up, Chris is called to a local crocodile park to treat Ted, a 5.4 metre monster with savage wounds to his snout after coming off second best in a fight.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Chris is shocked when a wild Currawong that has been speared by a wooden skewer is brought into the clinic. The spear has been in place for a number of weeks and new skin is growing around the spear, which must be removed but Chris is concerned that the shock of surgery may kill the wild bird.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Pluto the singing Dalmatian has lost his voice and Chris fears that the cause may be sinister. Pluto is very special to Chris because he was one of Chris’ first every patients.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Dr Chris is confronted by Benji, a small dog with a large heart murmur that Chris can feel before he even hears it. Without immediate surgery young Benji could die at any moment and Chris entrusts this tricky operation to the one person he knows can pull it off – Dr Andrew Marchevsky at SASH.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Chris has returned to Hamilton in country Victoria at the invitation of Hamilton Animal Health Clinic. As the city vet it’s hardly surprising that they give him the more unusual cases to deal with including Pepper, a pig that delivers still born piglets, twin foals where one is being rejected by its mother and a visit to a farm to test the fertility of their massive stud bulls by measuring the size of their jewels.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Dr Chris needs to use all his detective skills to find out why the end of Zaza, a pygmy bearded dragon’s tail keeps mysteriously falling off.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Back at the Bondi Clinic small West Highland Terrier Mr Pettibone arrives on the back of owner Henry’s Harley Davidson Motorcycle. The bikie dog has a persistent ear problem and Chris thinks he has the perfect solution.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Dr Chris is called out to Edgars Mission on the outskirts of Melbourne to deal with an extremely rare case - Charity the lamb was born without hooves on her right side and without some form of intervention her life will be cut short. Chris suggests something untried on a sheep in Australia - prosthetics hooves.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Dr Chris is called out to visit 42 year old Galah Pretty, who has a fast growing lump on his leg that is deeply concerning to owner Maurizio. Even though surgery on the old bird could kill it Maurizio is not keen on Chris’ alternative.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: When miniature goat Monty enters the Bondi Clinic the vet nurses are all smitten until they discovery what the cute 4 week old is harbouring on his skin!

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Miniature Horse Charlie has a severe problem with his mouth that Chris needs to investigate, but getting access to the tiny creatures teeth becomes a near impossible task.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Dr Chris receives a call from a Melbourne school principal. She has a 4 month old staffy called Juno whose health is deteriorating rapidly. Chris brings to the dog to Sydney to get a CT scan to find out what is happening with the young pup and what they discover is something so rare, only 20 cases have been recorded world wide. Juno’s blood vessels are all mixed up, and she requires a very high-risk surgery to have any chance of survival.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Ziggy the cat has a big problem – he weighs almost a third more than he should. Chris needs to re-educate both the cat and the devoted owner to ensure the cats deteriorating health is not compromised further.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: In this very special program the Bondi Vet travels to England to fulfill a dream he has always had about working in the UK. He is invited to join a clinic in Cornwall where he is presented with all sorts of animals great and small. From a diary calf requiring urgent surgery, to a prize winning duck with a torn foot that needs to be repaired in time for her next showing. He also treats a large Siberian Eagle Owl that requires an operation to fix a bad eye and must give the all clear to release two Atlantic Grey Seals that were washed up in recent storms.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: In an emotion charged episode, Chris is on a desperate rescue mission to save the life of a frail 3 day old orphan foal. Brulee has lost his mum, and won't survive unless Chris can find him a surrogate. But it's no guarantee a mare will accept the little foal.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Chris meets a labradoodle with a chronic sneezing problem. 2 year old Lulu suffers massive sneezing fits up to 4 times a day, and her devoted owner Kim is desperate for help. Chris fears Lulu may have a tumour.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Chris has been invited to Abu Dhabi after a special invitation to visit an extraordinary veterinary hospital. The hospital is for sick and injured falcons, and they are treated like royalty. Chris has to preform delicate surgery on a falcon wing.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: A tiny kitten has been found abandoned in a cardboard box, and Chris is shocked at the extent of her injuries. She desperately needs surgery to try to repair her shattered leg. Then it's a heartwarming search to find her a new home.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: The finale to Chris's trip is an unforgettable encounter with some of China's precious Giant Pandas. Chris is granted the rare privilege of hand feeding some youngsters. He's then allowed into the most sacred area of all - the panda kindergarten to meet the adorable babies.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Chris is confronted with an unusual patient, an albino echidna. But there's a question mark over whether the extremely rare echidna is a male or a female. It will have to be anaesthetised so Chris can investigate.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Tiny Amari has been born with a badly twisted back leg. At just 3 days old she's one of the youngest kittens Chris has ever seen at the clinic. The brave little battler needs a series of splints to try to save her leg, and give her a second chance.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Chris has travelled to the Cook Island to help out at a busy vet clinic in the capital Rarotonga. His first patient is Princess, a hit run victim. Chris quickly finds out just how tough it is looking after the local pets, with only basic facilities and limited supplies.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Three month old rescue puppy Tyson is being fostered by a family for just one week. But when foster Mum, Melissa takes the puppy to Chris for a routine check up she is confronted with terrible news. Tyson needs major heart surgery or he will die. Despite the expense, the family decide to adopt Tyson because they know no one else will give him a home in his condition. Will Tyson survive the openheart surgery and have a happy future with his new family?

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Chris has rushed to the Australian Reptile Park to handle an emergency. Two Tasmanian devil babies, Lara and Lily have been struck down with a mystery illness and are close to death. Can Chris save the two critically ill sisters or is the entire devil population at the park in danger of being wiped out?

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Two boxer puppies are found by police wandering the streets. One has been hit by a car and is coughing up blood. Chris is called to rescue the brothers. First, he must treat the hit run victim but then it becomes his mission to track down their owners and prevent them going to an animal shelter. The trouble is Chris is bonding with the puppies and is going to find it hard to let go.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: A miniature horse who is suffering from dwarfism disease was not meant to survive past six months. However his loving owner and a dedicated band of vets have beaten the odds and kept 2 year old Koda alive. Australia’s smallest horse is also a regular visitor at the Royal Children’s Hospital in Melbourne and lights up the lives of hundreds of sick kids. Now, however, the brave Koda faces another life threatening operation. Chris will be part of the elite surgical team that will decide Koda’s fate.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Two heartbroken little girls and their Mum are pleading for Dr Chris to save their beloved bunny. The family came home to find something shocking had happened to little Alice. The rabbit is the girls’ first pet and only 14 weeks old. This will be one of Dr Chris’ toughest cases.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: A beautiful kelpie is brought to Chris in a terrible state. A knock to the head as a puppy has caused severe balance problems but his condition is now deteriorating rapidly. His loving owner Heidi already has a baby to look after but she is constantly assisting Jasper and cannot bear the thought of losing him. In desperation, she looks to Chris for an answer. A brain scan shows his problems are inoperable but Chris refuses to give in. A custom made cart is fitted for Jasper and the sight of him moving about with his new “ wheels” is a heart warming salute to love and persistence.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Jen brings in her son’s dog Jewel to Dr Chris to find out if she’s expecting. The complication? This is an unplanned pregnancy and Jen suspects the father is her own dog, Token. X rays prove Jewel is having a football team of puppies. Get ready for a long night of anxiety, sadness and ultimately joy as Dr Chris helps Jewel through her ordeal. Funny scenes as proud father, Token keeps a close eye on proceedings to make sure his offspring are being well looked after.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: A beautiful pig is about to become pork chops if she keeps digging up the family property with her broken nose ring. Her owner, Allison loves Lola and has asked Chris to find a way to stop the execution. A new nose ring is the answer. Sounds easy but sedating an angry pig turns out to be a tough challenge. Watch out for some hilarious chase scenes.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Honey has taken a death-defying leap out of a car doing 40 kms an hour to chase down a cat. Somehow the spoodle has survived but just how serious are her injuries? Owner, Ilana is suffering enormous guilt that she didn’t have the family’s pride and joy safety strapped in the car. Watch for the cat hating spoodle’s reaction when she hears her archenemies out the back of the Bondi clinic.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Chris finally has a weekend off vet duties and is heading to Newcastle to catch up with his parents. But a call from his dad about a bizarre snake emergency sends him on a fascinating detour. What has the huge python swallowed that is now threatening to kill him? This a case of truth being stranger then fiction.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: A game of chasey at home turns ugly for Hooligan when he runs into his owner, Sarah. Hooligan’s horribly fractured leg needs major surgery at Sash but the tiny terrier has never spent a night away from his family and is not coping.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Chris is about to be confronted with the smallest patient he has ever handled. Twelve-year old Elliot’s much-loved pet mouse, Pinot has developed a massive, cancerous tumour. But surgery on such a pint-sized patient is going to be a real challenge. Will Pinot pull through or will a young girl be shattered?

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Homer the turtle is going on holidays while his owner is overseas. What can go wrong? Well ...try finding the little fellow in the fangs of the resident pooch. Babysitter Jody is guilt ridden and the traumatised Homer is the victim of a big bacteria bite. Can Chris save the day for everyone?

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Chris heads to the Victorian high country to help out a mate and to realise a boyhood dream of becoming a vet in the bush. It’s a challenging week as he treats everything from horses to wombats and monkeys and helps save a mother in trouble. Monkeys carry some nasty diseases and watch for Chris’ concerns about what he might leave Mansfield with. Talk about a dangerous job.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Pearl was at her regular hairdressing appointment when she started bleeding internally. Now the pampered poodle may have minutes to live and Chris is her only hope.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Little Lucu has been attacked by a paralysis tick and the poison is rapidly shutting down her system. A round the clock watch is needed to keep this innocent victim alive. But will it be enough?

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: A bizarre looking baby cockatoo has fallen twenty metres out of her nest and wants to alert the whole world to her plight. Can Chris help the little screamer and will she ever be able to fly?

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: An emotional case for Chris as he fights to save one of the clinic’s favourite patients. Beautiful Bluebell was dumped on the doorstep of the clinic as a kitten and adopted out to a loving family. Now Bluebell is the victim of a hit run accident and all the staff at Bondi are directly affected.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: The Australian Reptile Park operations manager, Tim Faulkner ropes Chris into a frightening mission in far north Queensland. A monster seven metre python called Big Mamma is living in the roof of a local boating club and the female paddlers are terrified. It’s all up to the intrepid duo as they head to Cairns to try to capture the scary reptile.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: A quick thinking police officer in Sydney’s infamous King Cross has rescued a twelve-week old puppy and rushed her into the Bondi clinic. The puppy was found sweltering in forty degree heat in a plastic handbag and the culprit has been arrested. Little Tilly soon finds a place in Chris’ heart and home where she has a confrontation with the resident cat, George. Without a microchip, the search is on for her owner.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: A morning walk has gone tragically wrong for Tigger and his distressed owner Bernadette. A street cleaner spooked the five year old and sent him charging into a car. Chris is trying to calm them both down to find out the extent of Tigger’s injuries.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Ziggy is a dog with an embarrassing problem. A huge mass is hanging off his back leg. Bemused vet nurse Neil tells us its like “ a third testicle swinging in the wind.” But when it comes to surgery it’s no laughing matter for Chris.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Boris the Staffy was born with a cleft palate. Lucky to survive, he has now endured seven operations to try to fix the gaping hole in his mouth. All have failed and time is running out. Chronic infections are now destroying his quality of life. Like Boris, his owner Jess is refusing to give up. She’s written to Chris looking for one last chance. The surgery will be the first of its type ever performed in Australia. Eight thousand dollars needs to be raised and Chris is prepared to go all the way for Boris!

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: West Highland terrier, Chester lives in Bondi but has a fanatical hatred of skateboarders. It’s a dangerous combination and one that is making life hell for his owners Mark and Jess. They’re worried Chester could bite someone and end up in serious trouble. What can Dr Chris come up with to tame the savage terrier?

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Chris is spending 2 weeks volunteering at the busy Esther Honey vet clinic in the Cook Islands. This week his first patient is a much loved cat called Small One, which has part of its nose missing. Chris is immediately concerned that Small One may have a skin cancer.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Chris makes a special trip to Karara in Queensland to see Stubby, a tiny 3-week-old piglet, born with only one trotter. Stubby is struggling to get around. If the brave little battler is to survive, Chris needs to work out a way for her to walk normally.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Chris travels to Edgars Mission on the outskirts of Melbourne, where he is faced with a very woolly fugitive. Ben Hall is a sheep that was rescued after 5 years on the run, and Chris is shocked at the condition of his heavy coat. The thick, matted wool could be hiding all sorts of health problems.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Chris is visiting remote Christmas Island where he has to help a seabird named Bill that is unable to fly. Bill is a rare Abbott’s Booby, and she's missing critical flight feathers. Chris needs to treat Bill's deformed wing, before starting rehabilitation with the young rescue bird.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Tim wants Chris to find out why Jack the koala has suddenly developed nasty bumps all over his face. Chris is so concerned, they take the little 2 year old to the local clinic for an immediate biopsy. When the results come back Tim is astonished to learn that Jack has acne.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: A dairy buffalo called Penny has severely deformed horns, which are growing into her skull, dangerously close to her brain. Chris has to try to corral the timid 10 year old, and then carry out the painstaking job of carefully removing the horns.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Chris is heading out to sea, to help try to save an endangered Grey Nurse shark, which has been spotted entangled in fishing line and with a hook stuck in its mouth. A specialist rescue team has been assembled and Chris is joining them in the water, to try to corral the injured shark so it can be brought to the surface.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Chris is helping out at the Marlin Coast veterinary hospital in Cairns. His first patient is a young dog which has had a nasty encounter with a hedgecutter. Misty has ended up with deep cuts across her nose. How the young dog avoided more disastrous injuries is a miracle.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Chris is helping out at the Marlin Coast veterinary hospital in Cairns, and his first patient is a rare Fijian iguana Called Ako. The Iguana hasn't been himself, and isn't eating properly. Chris needs to do an x-ray to try to work out what's going on. The results reveal a massive bladder stone inside the small animal, and he needs immediate surgery.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: A little joey has been brought in to Chris at the Bondi clinic after its mother was hit and killed by a car. It's feared the frail orphan may have a broken leg, but carer Sandy is determined to give the little battler a chance. It's a huge challenge for Chris to try to repair the leg. It's a heart stopping moment when he finds if the risky surgery has been a success.

programme.title: Country Vet Practice
programme.desc: Andrew investigates a worrying lump on a horse for a possible killer disease, but can he get close enough to find out. And Doctor Rachel is feeling the pressure when a passionate wildlife warrior brings in two distressed little Aussies.

programme.title: Country Vet Practice
programme.desc: Romi faces multiple emergencies when Lucy the groodle crashes before and during surgery, and Andrew treats a seriously ill goat that could be infested with a life-threatening parasite.

programme.title: Country Vet Practice
programme.desc: Andrew must make a life and death decision on a close friend’s pet cow. Rachel investigates why a friendly young Labrador has developed a worrying limp, but can she calm her terrified patient down enough to even treat him.

programme.title: Country Vet Practice
programme.desc: On this episode a critically ill kangaroo infant has Andrew and the young joey’s rescuer worried for its life. Dr Romi has her hand full with eight lively puppies, but will they get a clean bill of health?

programme.title: Country Vet Practice
programme.desc: On this episode delicate surgery has Andrew anxious for Sally the cow’s future. And why is doctor Romi so over the moon?

programme.title: Bondi Vet ER
programme.desc: Alex and Gerardo team up to save a greedy groodle that swallowed a tube of glue, Brooke battles a large bone stuck deep inside a dog’s throat and a tiny kitten is rushed in after a play session with the family dog goes horribly wrong.

programme.title: Bondi Vet ER
programme.desc: On this episode of Bondi Vet ER Luna has been rushed in to Alex with shocking injuries, Gerardo desperately tries to save a new born puppy, and a sock has gone missing and Ollie is facing serious trouble.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Billy answers an SOS from farmers in North Queensland who have lost chickens to a giant snake. Rob performs surgery on a German Shepherd with a broken leg. Michael removes a strange growth from a beloved African pygmy hedgehog .

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Billy has a close call with the worlds biggest crocodile during a health check. Michael comes up with a plan to treat a kittens life-threatening pelvic issues. Rescue cat Thor needs Robs help to fix a severely blocked bladder.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: The team is captured by a mysterious entity and enslaved in an elaborate underground facility.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: Lucy fights to save Murphy's life; Warren and the others battle a biologically modified zombie.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: Warren is unable to stop Murphy and the others from committing an atrocity as misplaced revenge.

programme.desc: The group explores an abandoned TV station while seeking a way to contact Kaya.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: Murphy learns more about his abilities when he is kidnapped by a group of outlaws; zombies attack.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: A change in plans has the team re-routed to a Colorado viral lab located in a nuclear missile silo.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: Picking up moments after the launch, the team is split up trying to outrun the impending blast.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: After tracking down Murphy, the group comes across a caravan of survivors transporting victims.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: The group makes its way to the greenhouse where Batch 47 is being grown by Odegard.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: A pregnant Serena tracks down Murphy; the survivors stumble across a hidden Mennonite farm.

programme.desc: A suspicious cosmonaut crashes on Citizen Z's station, putting him on high alert.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: The team desperately tries to stop a nuclear meltdown in a plant full of radiated zombies.

programme.desc: With Chris Pratt, Elizabeth Banks, Jennifer Connelly, Paul Whitehouse and Chaka Khan.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: With Sir Elton John, Stephen Fry, Carey Mulligan, Robbie Williams and Pink.

programme.desc: McBusted, Sir David Attenborough, Harry Hill, Gary Lineker and Jessica Chastain.

programme.desc: Guests include Benedict Cumberbatch, Eddie Redmayne, Bryan Cranston and LeAnn Rimes.

programme.desc: With George Clooney, Dwayne 'The Rock' Johnson, Hugh Laurie and Britt Robertson.

programme.desc: RICKY GERVAIS, RONNIE CORBETT, JULIETTE BINOCHE and IMELDA MAY.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Guests include Harry Styles, Brendan O'Carroll, Vicky McClure andRob Brydon.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Wth Keanu Reeves, Kylie Minogue, Taron Egerton, Jamie Bell and Suranne Jones.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: With Emilia Clarke, Phoebe Waller-Bridge, Gloria Estefan, David Tennant and Leon Bridges.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: With Orlando Bloom, Stephen Merchant and Tamsin Greig. Plus, music from SuRie.

programme.title: The Warrant: Breaker's Law
programme.desc: U.S. Marshal John Breaker and his deputy ride to a town held hostage by a ruthless gang as they transport a prisoner through the West. With the fate of a community at stake, they must decide if they will abandon the town or make a stand for justice.

programme.title: Kansas Pacific
programme.desc: With talks of a Civil War brewing, Southern saboteurs know they must keep Northern forces from using the U.S. train system. They devise a daring and dangerous plan to stop and capture a railroad engine, preventing the completion of a railroad line.

programme.title: The Tall Tales of Jim Bridger
programme.desc: When a young girl is bitten by a rattlesnake, mountain man Jim Bridger finds himself in a race against time to save her arm and keep her alive as he desperately searches the wilderness for a medicinal plant that once saved the life of his friend.

programme.title: Gunslinger
programme.desc: When a town marshal is gunned down, his wife bravely returns fire at the gunmen and kills one. The widow is named the town's temporary marshal. At her husband's funeral, she spies the second killer and plans to finish avenging her husband.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: In his first week on the job as the new constable of Jerome, Arizona, Jim Roberts gets to work arresting the town's troublemakers and teaching his timid deputy how to be a courageous lawman as they track down a stone-cold killer and his gang.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Three deserters escape from an Army stockade and hide at the Ponderosa. When a captain comes looking for them, Ben soon realizes how the prisoners are being treated and resolves to confront his good friend in charge.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Hoss and Joe desperately look for a way to prevent brothers Adam and Ben from being hanged for a crime. A stranger, Lassiter, comes to town in an attempt to find the truth and prove Adam and Ben's innocence.

programme.title: War of the Wildcats
programme.desc: During the early days of the Oklahoma oil boom, a greedy, self-assured oilman and a quiet, yet determined cowboy fight for the rights to oil on Indian land. All the while a pretty schoolteacher steals both men's hearts.

programme.title: The Tall Tales of Jim Bridger
programme.desc: After discovering a river filled with gold, Jim Bridger and his fellow trappers believe they are near El Dorado, the mythical Spanish city of gold. But their insatiable greed turns friends into enemies and puts Bridger at risk of a gruesome fate.

programme.title: The Tall Tales of Jim Bridger
programme.desc: While guiding a hunting expedition, Jim Bridger must deal with an arrogant foreign prince who is abusing his servant boy. But the tables soon turn, when it's the prince who needs rescuing, and his only hope is the long-suffering servant boy.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: A posse pursues Jud Steele, a wanted gunslinger, and his partner. They join the wagon train to rest their horses. Steele dies trying to steal fresh horses. Hawks returns his belongings to the sheriff, who says Steele died five years ago.

programme.title: The Warrant: Breaker's Law
programme.desc: U.S. Marshal John Breaker and his deputy ride to a town held hostage by a ruthless gang as they transport a prisoner through the West. With the fate of a community at stake, they must decide if they will abandon the town or make a stand for justice.

programme.title: Kansas Pacific
programme.desc: With talks of a Civil War brewing, Southern saboteurs know they must keep Northern forces from using the U.S. train system. They devise a daring and dangerous plan to stop and capture a railroad engine, preventing the completion of a railroad line.

programme.title: The Tall Tales of Jim Bridger
programme.desc: When a young girl is bitten by a rattlesnake, mountain man Jim Bridger finds himself in a race against time to save her arm and keep her alive as he desperately searches the wilderness for a medicinal plant that once saved the life of his friend.

programme.title: Borderline
programme.desc: In the 1950s, a female police officer goes undercover and travels into Mexico to gain a drug smuggler's confidence. She is in constant danger as she attempts to figure out the details of the smuggling operation, and who she can trust with her life.

programme.title: Into The Wild Frontier
programme.desc: As a member of Lewis and Clark's Corps of Discovery, John Colter travels from the Missouri River all the way to the Pacific Ocean, but he decides not to return to the civilized East when the expedition ends. Entranced by the beauty and adventure of the wild frontier, he becomes one of America's first mountain men. As a hunter, trapper and explorer in his own right, he's the first American to see the Grand Tetons and the epic Yellowstone Valley. While his epic explorations make him famous, it's a harrowing ordeal with Blackfeet warriors that makes him a legend. After boldly venturing into territory controlled by the Blackfeet tribe, Colter is captured, stripped naked, and forced to run for his life as warriors give chase in what will come to be known as Colter's Run.

programme.title: County Line: All In
programme.desc: The murder of a crooked lawyer on the county line forces two neighboring sheriffs to put aside their differences to take down the killer.

programme.title: Turquoise Fever
programme.desc: After the death of their patriarch, the Otteson family struggles to cope, and their turquoise production grinds to a halt. In response, Donna takes charge by reopening her jewelry business and pushing the miners to step up their output to ensure a reliable supply of high-grade turquoise. Trenton and Tony decide to prospect at the last claim where Dean mined in hopes of surprising Donna with a treasure trove of precious stone. Tommy and Danny try their luck at the long-forgotten Montezuma claim and stumble across a hidden tunnel that may still hold riches.

programme.title: The Sundowners
programme.desc: When a dispute over grazing rights to a fertile canyon leads to cattle rustling, the rustling ignites a range war, turning two brothers against one another. Will both brothers survive the deadly conflict between them?

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: When a U.S. Marshal arrests one of the Ponderosa's workers for murder and takes him to Los Angeles for trial, Hoss and Adam go to make sure the marshal doesn't kill the accused before they get there.

programme.title: Legends of the Pony Express
programme.desc: Heroic Pony Express riders and station keepers face deadly terrain, hostile Native Americans, and dangerous outlaws to deliver vital mail across the untamed frontier. Their life-and-death adventures unite the country and become the stuff of legends.

programme.title: Cavalry Charge
programme.desc: When two brothers each decide to fight on opposite sides in the Civil War, they never dreamed they would need to reunite and fight together. It is the only chance they have, if they hope to survive a brutal Indian attack.

programme.title: Borderline
programme.desc: In the 1950s, a female police officer goes undercover and travels into Mexico to gain a drug smuggler's confidence. She is in constant danger as she attempts to figure out the details of the smuggling operation, and who she can trust with her life.

programme.title: Into The Wild Frontier

programme.title: County Line: All In
programme.desc: The murder of a crooked lawyer on the county line forces two neighboring sheriffs to put aside their differences to take down the killer.

programme.title: Turquoise Fever
programme.desc: After the death of their patriarch, the Otteson family struggles to cope, and their turquoise production grinds to a halt. Tommy and Danny try their luck at the long-forgotten Montezuma claim and stumble across a hidden tunnel that may still hold riches.

programme.title: The Sundowners
programme.desc: When a dispute over grazing rights to a fertile canyon leads to cattle rustling, the rustling ignites a range war, turning two brothers against one another. Will both brothers survive the deadly conflict between them?

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: When a U.S. Marshal arrests one of the Ponderosa's workers for murder and takes him to Los Angeles for trial, Hoss and Adam go to make sure the marshal doesn't kill the accused before they get there.

programme.title: Legends of the Pony Express
programme.desc: Heroic Pony Express riders and station keepers face deadly terrain, hostile Native Americans, and dangerous outlaws to deliver vital mail across the untamed frontier. Their life-and-death adventures unite the country and become the stuff of legends.

programme.title: Cavalry Charge
programme.desc: When two brothers each decide to fight on opposite sides in the Civil War, they never dreamed they would need to reunite and fight together. It is the only chance they have, if they hope to survive a brutal Indian attack.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: While volunteering with kids in the community, Cody makes a connection with a possible buyer for his specialty cattle sale. With Booger still away at the Road to the Horse competition, Cody and Bubba recruit a friend to help with the work on the ranch. Cody rushes to finish up for the day, determined to make it home in time for his son's first haircut, but in his haste, he ends up hurting himself. Bubba visits an organic ranch in Texas to learn more about the organic business. To test the product, he cooks up store brand and grass-fed steaks to compare the taste and make sure it is something he can get behind. Booger finally gets home after the competition and immediately receives an opportunity to train horses in Austin. After spending some time apart, the cowboys come together to talk about the future of their partnership. Things take a turn for the worse when the meeting between friends gets heated, leaving the fate of their business up in the air.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: When their conversation about their partnership hits a wall, each cowboy decides to branch out and focus on their individual pursuits. Booger completes a job for an acquaintance who asks him to find a horse for his teenage granddaughter. The search for the right horse proves to be challenging, but he finally finds one gentle enough for an amateur rider. The experience reminds Booger of how passionate he is about working with horses, and he decides to accept the offer to train them in Austin. Struggling to find buyers for his specialty cattle sale, Cody meets with the Cattle Association Board to pitch the specialty sale to them and secure buyers. Bubba heads north to show the investors a location for the organic ranch, but when they don't show up, he starts to wonder if this deal was a big mistake. Booger, Cody, and Bubba meet up and decide to sell off their entire herd, officially putting their partnership on hold. Jaclyn comes up with a plan to mend Booger and Cody's friendship.

programme.title: Handcrafted America
programme.desc: Host Jill Wagner travels the country on a quest to find talented craftsmen who still make incredible items by hand. In Englewood, Colorado, Jill meets an acclaimed team of belt buckle makers. These artisans use any material they can, including sand and minerals, to adorn their custom Western themed products. Up north, in Montpelier, Vermont, Jill meets Jonathan Herz who has single-handedly revived the lost sound and style of 19th century music boxes. Finally, in Shelburn, Indiana, Jill is on hand to see legendary knife maker Tony Bose craft one of his highly sought after pocketknives.

programme.title: State Plate
programme.desc: Host Taylor Hicks heads to Virginia for a State Plate stunner that brings to light not one, but three entrees, along with an appetizer and dessert. Virginia has a plentiful peanut crop, so Taylor follows their journey from field to table with an appetizer of peanut soup. Then, 10,000 miles of shoreline leads him to the first entree: a surprisingly entertaining fish known as the sugar toad. There's no way Taylor can pass up the second entree: a helping of Virginia country ham. Virginia is also known as the flounder capital of the world, so Taylor heads to its eastern shore for the third entree of bronzed flounder. When it's time for dessert, Colonial Williamsburg serves Taylor a hefty dose of history in a sweet mug of colonial chocolate.

programme.title: They Call Me Trinity
programme.desc: When a land-hungry rancher sends his bullies to harass peace-loving Mormons into giving up their fertile valley, a lazy gunfighter with a very quick draw and amazing accuracy, along with his horse-thieving brother, come to the settlers' rescue.

programme.title: The Young Land
programme.desc: When an American gunslinger kills a Mexican man in California immediately in the aftermath of the Mexican-American War, he is arrested and put on trial for murder. The local population is anxious to see if justice will prevail.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: It's time for the cowboys to ride into new pastures as they explore growing their cattle business in unexpected ways. Bubba has been making good money working for his father-in-law's company in Mississippi, but he realizes he'd rather be out of his office chair and back on his horse in Alabama. Cody is excited to be managing a big rodeo, but a steer mishap puts the future of his contract on the ropes. And, even though Booger has happily saddled up with Jaclyn, it's unfamiliar terrain for him when she starts adding a woman's touch to his bachelor pad. As the three cowboys get together to sort yearlings for a friend, they devise a plan for making BBQ sauce to expand their cooking skills and company.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: Booger and Cody team up to pen a herd of cattle, but a stubborn cow takes refuge in a fishing hole, requiring some creative wrangling. The stress of maintaining a long-distance relationship leads Bubba and Kaley to move back to Alabama for good. Booger embraces his new role as a family man and enlists young Matthew to help surprise Jaclyn with a much needed home-improvement project. Cody helps Misty throw a beef-tasting party for potential buyers. As the guys ponder using their cowboy skills to open a steak house, they decide to get some on-the-job training by working a shift during the hectic dinner rush at a local eatery.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: An inspector comes from New Orleans to Virginia City intending to arrest Ben Cartwright for a murder committed 20 years ago. Ben now must travel to New Orleans to stand trial and considers withdrawing from the governor's race.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: As U.S. Marshal Bass Reeves attempts to arrest Belle Starr and her outlaw husband, Belle asks for 24 hours to find someone to care for her young daughter, Pearl. When the Starr family decides to flee instead, the Marshal must track them down.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: Teenaged fugitive William Bonney is given a second chance when a kindhearted ranch owner offers him a job. But when his new employer is killed in cold blood, Bonney reverts to his criminal ways, seeking vengeance and transforming into Billy the Kid.

programme.title: Into The Wild Frontier
programme.desc: Legendary frontiersman Daniel Boone faces the biggest challenge of his life when the Shawnee take him prisoner. He must find a way to escape and travel 160 miles through hostile territory to warn Boonesborough, and his family, of a looming attack.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: As U.S. Marshal Bass Reeves attempts to arrest Belle Starr and her outlaw husband, Belle asks for 24 hours to find someone to care for her young daughter, Pearl. When the Starr family decides to flee instead, the Marshal must track them down.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: Teenaged fugitive William Bonney is given a second chance when a kindhearted ranch owner offers him a job. But when his new employer is killed in cold blood, Bonney reverts to his criminal ways, seeking vengeance and transforming into Billy the Kid.

programme.title: Into The Wild Frontier
programme.desc: Legendary frontiersman Daniel Boone faces the biggest challenge of his life when the Shawnee take him prisoner. He must find a way to escape and travel 160 miles through hostile territory to warn Boonesborough, and his family, of a looming attack.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: While visiting family in Mississippi, Cody secures prize cattle for his specialty sale, but one small mistake puts the deal in jeopardy. In anticipation of their move north, Bubba and Kaley visit their favorite places around town and take a trip down memory lane. Bubba breaks the news to his mother about the organic farm. After he catches her up on his current situation with the other cowboys, she encourages him to make things right. Booger heads to Austin, where he learns how to work with English-style horses and receives an offer to train horses for the entire summer. Booger returns home and gets a big surprise when Jaclyn introduces him to their newest family member. Cody reaches out to Booger and Bubba to get them all together so they can make amends and work out their differences. The cowboys consider taking a big job in Texas and working together again.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: After all the time and effort Cody and Misty spent on preparing and organizing, the day of their specialty cattle sale finally arrives and proves to be a huge success. Jaclyn is hesitant about Booger spending the summer training horses in Austin. Following Misty's advice, he decides to take Jaclyn and Matthew on a trip to the Lone Star State so he can show them what a great experience it could be for the entire family. Bubba's deal to start an organic ranch up north falls through, but with the investors still interested in working with him, a new opportunity presents itself. Cody, Booger, and Bubba get back in the swing of things and head to Texas for a grueling cattle drive. With the help of Booger, Kaley surprises Bubba with an exciting announcement that could change their lives.

programme.title: Handcrafted America
programme.desc: Host Jill Wagner travels the country on a quest to find talented craftsmen who still make incredible items by hand. Jill starts in Hilo, Hawaii where she meets Leilehua Yuen, a metal torch maker. Leilehua shows Jill the techniques she learned from her father that she continues to use today. In Denver, Colorado, Jill meets Phil Watkins, a traditional stained glass creator that is carrying on a centuries old family artistry. Finally, in Austin, Texas, she visits Davis and Franz Blanchard, a father and son team who create a special wind chime for Jill with a decidedly Texas melody.

programme.title: State Plate
programme.desc: Taylor heads to Indiana, known for its farmland, Americana and sports. First stop, county-fair comfort food: corn dogs. Taylor tries being a dog dipper with local cornmeal batter before digging in. He then heads from fair food to fine fare with an entree of one of the Hoosier State's top products: duck. Taylor helps cook a succulent duck breast served atop duck confit, cooked with liquid gold (duck fat) and topped with duck sauce, a gourmet treat. Then it's off to the farm for world class fresh corn on the cob, a picnic favorite. Plus, he'll make time for Indiana's other iconic crop, tomatoes, turned into a tasty side freshly stewed. And for dessert, Taylor helps make a depression era staple, sugar cream pie with a little sweet, a little dairy and a lot of love.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Tom Edwards is in a wheelchair and holds Ben Cartwright responsible for his condition. When Tom turns to drinking to ease his pain, the Cartwrights work together to help him find purpose in his life again.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: After escaping the bonds of slavery, Bass Reeves takes refuge among the indigenous people of The Indian Territory, where he is welcomed into their culture. When the Civil War ends, his new-found tracking skills and fluency in native languages lead to his appointment as the first Black Deputy U.S. Marshal west of the Mississippi River. Though he faces discrimination from his peers, Reeves earns their respect when he accepts Judge Isaac Parker's daunting order to hunt down one of the most ruthless killers in The Indian Territory and bring him back dead or alive. Some years later, Bat Masterson, legendary gunfighter-turned-newspaperman, interviews Judge Parker to learn more about the amazing career of Bass Reeves, who goes on to arrest 3,000 felons, kill 14 men in self-defense, and complete 32 years of service without being wounded.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: Wild Bill Hickok and his buddy, Davis Tutt, see their friendship fall apart over gambling debts and the affections of a beautiful woman. After Tutt swipes Wild Bill's prized timepiece as payback for a disputed debt, things begin to heat up. Then, when Tutt parades through town with the watch in one hand and Hickok's former girlfriend in the other, Wild Bill's blood begins to boil. Tutt refuses to return the watch, and he continues to flaunt the beautiful woman on his arm. The two men meet in the middle of town to settle their differences once and for all in what will become the very first quick-draw duel of the Old West. Both men reach for their pistols at the same time and fire! In an attempt to separate the truth from the fiction, Bat Masterson, legendary gunfighter-turned-newspaperman, interviews George Ward Nichols, the journalist who immortalized the duel and created the legend of Wild Bill Hickok.

programme.title: Into The Wild Frontier
programme.desc: Coming of age on the frontier, young Bill Hamilton joins Old Bill Williams on an epic adventure during the final days of the fur trade. The last true mountain man, Hamilton's courage is tested when he faces an epic showdown with Bannock warriors.

programme.title: Ultimate Cowboy Showdown
programme.desc: After demonstrating their calf-roping skills, the 8 remaining cowboys are challenged to drive a herd of cattle and an old-fashioned chuck wagon across the rugged Arizona terrain. Host Trace Adkins and his expert judges send another cowboy packing.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: Bubba's back in the saddle with the guys when his horse bucks and throws him on a bone-breaking fall, fractures his cowboy spirit and immobilizes his work with the cattle company. Booger enlists a bullfighter to help him wrangle his ornery Brahman cattle, and considers whether or not he has enough land to maintain the growing herd. Misty gives Cody a gift from the heart that captures both their past as a couple and honors their growing family legacy as ranchers. The guys pitch each other competing ideas for their future steakhouse, and Cody's brainstorm stands out as the one with true cowboy vision - including a name for their venture.

programme.title: Intervention
programme.desc: Audrey, 24, was popular and artistic. Now, she is a heroin addict.

programme.title: Intervention
programme.desc: After being molested as a child, Nicole developed.

programme.title: Intervention
programme.desc: When Skyler was a kid, his mother pushed him to do modeling and TV work.

programme.title: Intervention
programme.desc: A 44-year-old singer and songwriter, Phillip used music to escape.

programme.title: Intervention
programme.desc: Antwahn and Billy self-destruct with drugs after successful careers.

programme.title: Intervention
programme.desc: Dorothy was neglected as a child by her alcoholic mother.

programme.title: Intervention
programme.desc: Genealogist Jeff can't quit his beer habit despite failing health and family loss.

programme.title: Intervention
programme.desc: Antwahn and Billy self-destruct with drugs after successful careers.

programme.title: Intervention
programme.desc: Adam, a heroin user, panhandles for drug money. His family is desperate for help.
